verdict_summary: Anonymous chat at chatglm.cn root captured: 27 MB HAR / 170 entries / 81 SSE frames; real streaming endpoint is POST /chatglm/backend-api/assistant/stream with default assistant_id (NOT a separate mainchat-api endpoint).
notes: KEY FINDING vs #948: chatglm.cn root (/) auto-redirects to /main/alltoolsdetail and the streaming chat goes through the SAME endpoint family as the assistant feature: POST /chatglm/backend-api/assistant/stream. The request body uses a hardcoded DEFAULT assistant_id=65940acff94777010aa6b796 (general assistant) for anonymous root navigation, vs a specific assistant_id for /alltoolsdetail tool sessions. There is NO dedicated /chatglm/mainchat-api/.../stream chat endpoint — mainchat-api is only used for conversation list, title, guest status, and stream lifecycle pings. APF block/warning matching on path /chatglm/backend-api/assistant/stream covers both anonymous root chat AND assistant-feature chat; the wire protocol (text/event-stream, parts[].content[].text deltas, status init/finish) is identical between the two flows. Anonymous chat works without login — full Korean response 안녕하세요! ... was streamed back in 81 SSE frames (101 KB body). Capture done via Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222 + CDP Network domain (Save-as-HAR via DevTools UI was blocked by tab-click focus issues; CDP path was reliable).
